description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile red sports car with a streamlined body and a prominent rear spoiler, designed for high performance and speed. The car features a sharply angled front with pop-up headlights, a wide black windshield, and sculpted side panels that enhance its aerodynamic appearance. The wheels are large, with stylish multi-spoke alloy rims and visible red brake calipers, adding to its aggressive stance. The rear of the car is characterized by a horizontal taillight bar and a subtle Honda badge, while the side mirrors are compact and integrated into the design. The windows are tinted black, giving the car a modern, high-end look. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet sturdy construction, typical of high-end sports cars intended for urban and track environments.
description: A red, low-slung sports car with a rear spoiler, pop-up headlights, and multi-spoke alloy wheels. It features a streamlined, aerodynamic body and tinted black windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply angled nose, pop-up headlights, wide black windshield, and Honda badge.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted side panels, large alloy wheels, and the prominent rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the horizontal taillight bar, rear Honda badge, and the full width of the spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic profile, alloy wheels, and rear spoiler.
attribute_wheel_design: five-spoke alloy wheels with a split-spoke pattern and visible red brake calipers
